name: BB:UBA : Blocked File Transfer
notes: Detects denied file transfer, FTP and TFTP attempts.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Blocked File Transfer on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.FileTransfer Denied, Application.FTP Denied, Application.TFTP Session Denied, Access.FTP Action Denied
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Blocked File Transfer on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.FileTransfer Denied, Application.FTP Denied, Application.TFTP Session Denied, Access.FTP Action Denied
